response:
This is the standard CLRS-algorithm red-black tree post-insertion rebalancing function, which runs immediately after a new node is inserted to repair violated red-black tree invariants.
It resolves red parent violations by either recoloring the parent, uncle and grandparent when the uncle node is red, or performing the required left/right rotations and targeted recoloring when the uncle is black, propagating upwards through the tree as needed before finally ensuring the tree root remains black.
